chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.D-95 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2476/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.2477/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 Mr.Mashooque Ali Mahar, Advocate for applicant ******* Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wish to press this Bail Application. He is duly authorized by the Vakalatnama for such purpose. Accordingly, this Bail Application is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application (s). JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
